title: taraxacum atrolivaceum
intro: Taraxacum atrolivaceum, also known as the pale dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum atrolivaceum include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to support liver and digestive health. In herbal preparations, Taraxacum atrolivaceum can be found in teas, infusions, and extracts, often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
